title: Senior Fleet Manager at Red Express

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Red Express
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Red Express! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Red Express:
Red Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Red Express!
